docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-10-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUL-12-2021 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF GOLD CLUB IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JOHN SHEERS, MANGER. DEFENDANT EZEKIEL CHAIDEZ IS PRESENT BY UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT IS ALLOWED A CONTINUANCE TO TIMELY SUBMIT ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUEST. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-12-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF GOLD CLUB, REPRESENTED BY JOHN SHEARS, MANAGER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EZEKIEL CHAIDEZ IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLD CLUB AS TO DEFENDANT CHAIDEZ, EZEKIEL
